factionAbilities.name: MITOSIS
factionAbilities.effect: Your space docks cannot produce infantry. At the start of the status phase, place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on any planet you control.

versions.effect: Place this card face up in your play area. While this card is in your play area, the Arborec player cannot produce units in or adjacent to non-home systems that contain 1 or more of your units. If you activate a system that contains 1 or more of the Arborec player's units, return this card to the Arborec player.

versions.timing: After another player moves ships into a system that contains 1 or more of your units:
versions.effect: You may place 1 command token from that player's reinforcements in any non-home system. Then, return this card to the Arborec player.

factionTechnologies.name: Bioplasmosis
factionTechnologies.effect: At the end of the status phase, you may remove any number of infantry from planets you control and place them on 1 or more planets you control in the same or adjacent systems.

abilities.name: Respawn
abilities.effect: After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 6 or greater, place the unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit that is on this card on a planet you control in your home system.

abilities.name: Production
abilities.effect: After you activate this system, you may produce up to 5 units in this system.

mech.name: Letani Behemoth
mech.deploy: When you would use your MITOSIS faction ability you may replace 1 of your infantry with 1 mech from your reinforcements instead.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías rojas pueden usarse como verdes para prerrequisitos, y viceversa (no ambas a la vez).

ability.name: Psychospore
ability.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this card to remove a command token from a system that contains 1 or more of your infantry and return it to your reinforcements. Then, place 1 infantry in that system.

agent.name: Letani Ospha
agent.ability: ACTION: Exhaust this card and choose a player's non-fighter ship; that player may replace that ship with one from their reinforcements that costs up to 2 more than the replaced ship.

commander.name: Dirzuga Rophal
commander.unlock: Have 12 Ground Forces on Planets you control.
commander.ability: After another player activates a system that contains 1 or more of your units that have PRODUCTION: You may produce 1 unit in that system.

hero.name: Letani Miasmiala
hero.ability: ULTRASONIC EMITTER — ACTION: Produce any number of units in any number of systems that contain 1 or more of your ground forces. Then, purge this card.
